preconditions: User is not authenticated before starting each test
Browser session is newly launched or cleared of authenticated session data

testCases.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state for an unauthenticated user
steps: Launch the application in a new browser session
Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Wait for the Home page to finish loading
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page loads successfully in guest state and displays guest-accessible controls without showing authenticated user state information.

testCases.title: Verify guest-state shared Home controls are visible and enabled on initial page load
steps: Open http://localhost/washtabui/home in a new unauthenticated browser session
Observe the Home page controls without interacting with them
testCases.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, Home button, Customer signup button, Clean survey button, and Site survey button are all visible and enabled in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Person/Profile button from guest Home state opens the Login page
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Click the Person/Profile button once
testCases.expectedResult: The application opens the Login page or Login view from the Home page guest state.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Customer signup button from guest Home state opens the customer-search page
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Click the Customer signup button
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the guest Home page to the customer-search page.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Clean survey button from guest Home state opens the vehicle-survey page
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Click the Clean survey button
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the guest Home page to the vehicle-survey page.

testCases.title: Verify clicking the Site survey button from guest Home state opens the survey page
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Click the Site survey button
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the guest Home page to the survey page.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button remains enabled and responsive after returning to Home page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user
Click the Person/Profile button to open the Login page or Login view
Use browser navigation to return to the Home page
Click the Person/Profile button again
testCases.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button remains enabled after returning to the Home page and opens the Login page or Login view again without requiring a page refresh.

testCases.title: Verify shared Home shell controls remain visible in guest state after navigation back to Home
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Click the Customer signup button to leave the Home page
Use browser navigation or application navigation to return to the Home page
Observe the shared Home controls
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button, Notification button, Home button, and Person/Profile button are visible and enabled again after returning to the Home guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Home button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Open the application at http://localhost/washtabui/home
Observe the Home button state
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button is visible, enabled, and displayed as part of the shared Home page shell controls in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Open the application at http://localhost/washtabui/home
Observe the Notification button state
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible, enabled, and displayed as part of the shared Home page shell controls in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Back button is visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Open the application at http://localhost/washtabui/home
Observe the Back button state
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button is visible, enabled, and displayed as part of the shared Home page shell controls in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify guest Home page can be refreshed without losing guest-state controls
steps: Launch the application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Refresh the browser page
Wait for the SPA to reload
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page reloads successfully in guest state and all approved guest-accessible controls remain visible and enabled after refresh.

testCases.title: Verify direct URL access to Home page always opens guest state when no authenticated session exists
steps: Close all browser tabs and clear the unauthenticated session
Directly enter http://localhost/washtabui/home into the browser address bar
Wait for the Home page to load
testCases.expectedResult: The SPA opens directly into the Home page guest state and does not redirect to an authenticated experience.

testCases.title: Verify guest-accessible feature buttons remain actionable after opening and leaving Login view
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Click the Person/Profile button to open the Login page or Login view
Return to the Home page without authenticating
Click the Site survey button
testCases.expectedResult: The Site survey button remains enabled and successfully opens the survey page after the user returns from the Login view without signing in.
